# Vendored: awesome-claude-skills

This directory holds material vendored from **ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills**
that is kept for reference but intentionally **not** placed in `.claude/skills/`
(so it isn't auto-loaded by Claude Code).

- Source: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills
- License: **Apache-2.0** ("Individual skills may have different licenses.")
- Contents:
  - `composio-skills/` — 832 Composio SaaS-connector automation skills (each a
    `SKILL.md`). These require Composio/MCP to run. Promote any you want into
    `.claude/skills/<name>/` to make it discoverable.
  - `README.md` — the upstream curated index (links to 100+ external skills).

The 32 curated general-purpose skills from this repo were copied into
`.claude/skills/` directly. See `.claude/skills/README.md` for details and
attribution.
